info.title: MindBridge API
info.description: RESTful API for the MindBridge AI-guided CBT platform for workplace burnout recovery. Covers authentication, onboarding, CBT sessions, thought record diary, progress tracking, crisis support, media analysis, personalization, and healthcare integration.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: CBT session library, active sessions, history

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Real-time AI chat within CBT sessions

tags.name: Scenarios
tags.description: Interactive workplace scenarios and thought challenges

tags.name: Diary
tags.description: Thought record diary entries and pattern insights

tags.name: Progress
tags.description: Progress dashboard, mood trends, goals, achievements

tags.name: Crisis
tags.description: Crisis detection, coping strategies, safety plan, emergency resources

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Audio and video upload and emotional analysis

tags.name: Personalization
tags.description: User profile, goals, preferences, AI adaptation

tags.name: Healthcare
tags.description: Therapist integration, FHIR export, progress reports

post.description: Creates a new user account with email and password. Returns JWT tokens. Supports US-1.1.
Authenticates user credentials and returns JWT access and refresh tokens. Supports REQ-AUTH-008 session management.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token pair. Supports REQ-AUTH-008 idle session timeout.
Persists the user's onboarding path selection. Supports US-1.2 and REQ-AUTH-002.

referralCode.description: Therapist referral code (required when path is therapist_referred)

get.description: Returns the list of consent items (HIPAA, data ownership, AI processing, crisis protocols) with their descriptions. Supports US-1.3.

post.description: Records the user's consent for each required item. All items must be accepted. Supports US-1.3 and REQ-AUTH-003/004.

get.description: Returns the 5-question burnout assessment covering exhaustion, efficacy, cynicism, cognitive function, and detachment. Supports US-1.4 and REQ-PER-001.

post.description: Submits all 5 assessment answers and returns computed burnout score with severity classification. Supports US-1.4, US-1.6, and REQ-PER-002.
Saves the user's name, selected recovery goals, and preferred session time. Supports US-1.5 and REQ-PER-003/004.
Marks the user's onboarding as complete and activates the main dashboard. Supports US-1.6.

get.summary: Get the session library with modules and statuses
get.description: Returns all sessions grouped by module with status indicators. Supports US-2.1 and REQ-CBT-001/002/003.
Returns session title, duration, objectives, modalities, and description. Supports US-2.2 and REQ-CBT-004.

post.description: Initiates a new active session instance. Returns the session instance ID and initial AI greeting. Supports US-2.3 and REQ-CBT-005.

post.summary: End a session (early or on completion)
post.description: Ends the active session and generates the completion summary. Supports US-2.8, US-2.11, and REQ-CBT-012/015.

get.description: Returns the full session summary with insights, transcript, distortions, emotional arc, and homework. Supports US-2.8 and REQ-CBT-012.
Returns current step, total steps, and completed step list. Supports US-2.7 and REQ-CBT-011.
Returns all completed sessions with date, title, duration, and mood change. Supports US-2.9 and REQ-CBT-013.

get.summary: Get chat messages for a session
get.description: Returns the full chat transcript for the active or completed session. Supports US-2.3 and REQ-CBT-005/006.

post.summary: Send a text message in the AI chat
post.description: Sends a user text message and returns the AI therapist response. Supports US-2.3, US-2.10, and REQ-CBT-005/006.

post.summary: Send a message and stream the AI response (SSE)
post.description: Sends a user message and streams the AI therapist response in real time via Server-Sent Events. Supports US-2.3 typing indicator and real-time delivery.

schema.description: Server-Sent Event stream with data chunks

get.summary: Get interactive workplace scenarios for a session
get.description: Returns the set of workplace scenarios with response options. Supports US-2.5 and REQ-CBT-008.

post.summary: Submit a response to a workplace scenario
post.description: Submits the user's selected response and returns feedback. Supports US-2.5 and REQ-CBT-008/009.

get.description: Returns the score summary for all scenarios in the session. Supports US-2.5 and REQ-CBT-009.
Returns the current state of the structured thought challenge. Supports US-2.6 and REQ-CBT-010.

post.description: Submits one step of the thought challenge (thought, evidence, alternative, belief rating). Supports US-2.6 and REQ-CBT-010.

get.description: Returns all thought record diary entries with date, mood shift, emotions, and distortion tags. Supports US-3.1 and REQ-DRY-001.

post.description: Submits the complete diary entry (mood, situation, thoughts, emotions, distortions, reframe, belief rating). Supports US-3.2 through US-3.7 and REQ-DRY-002 through DRY-007.

201.description: Diary entry created with AI insights

get.summary: Get diary entry detail with AI analysis
get.description: Returns the full diary entry with overview, AI-guided transcript, and AI analysis tabs. Supports US-3.9 and REQ-DRY-009.
Returns all cognitive distortion types with descriptions. Supports US-3.5 and REQ-DRY-005.

post.summary: AI-suggest likely distortions from a thought
post.description: Analyzes an automatic thought and returns suggested cognitive distortions. Supports US-3.5 and REQ-DRY-005.
Given an automatic thought and identified distortions, returns AI-generated guiding prompts for cognitive restructuring. Supports US-3.6 and REQ-DRY-006.

get.summary: Get pattern insights across all diary entries
get.description: Returns aggregated mood trends, top emotions, top distortions, and AI narrative analysis. Supports US-3.8 and REQ-DRY-008.
Returns key stats, weekly mood chart, burnout recovery score, and weekly goals. Supports US-4.1 through US-4.4 and REQ-PER-007.

parameters.name: weekOf
parameters.description: ISO date for the week to query (defaults to current week)

get.summary: Get monthly trends, heatmap, and AI insights
get.description: Returns mood trend, burnout trend, activity heatmap, and AI narrative insights. Supports US-4.5.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: ISO month (YYYY-MM) to query (defaults to current month)

get.summary: Get burnout recovery score with sub-dimensions
get.description: Returns overall recovery percentage and Exhaustion, Cynicism, Efficacy breakdowns with weekly changes. Supports US-4.3.
Returns all achievements with locked/unlocked state and encouragement. Supports US-4.6, US-4.7, and REQ-PER-008.
Returns weekly goals with current progress and targets. Supports US-4.4 and REQ-PER-007.
Returns crisis awareness content, pathways, and 988 call action. Supports US-5.1 and REQ-CRS-001/002.
Returns coping strategy cards (breathing, grounding, PMR) with exercise configurations. Supports US-5.2 and REQ-CRS-003/004/005.

post.summary: Record completion of a coping exercise
post.description: Logs that the user completed a breathing, grounding, or relaxation exercise. Supports REQ-CRS-003/004.

get.description: Returns crisis hotlines, therapist contact, and trusted personal contacts. Supports US-5.3 and REQ-CRS-006/007.
Returns the user's saved trusted personal contacts for crisis situations. Supports US-5.3 and REQ-CRS-007.
Returns the 6-step safety plan with warning signs, coping strategies, contacts, resources, and environment safety. Supports US-5.4 and REQ-CRS-008/009.

put.description: Updates one or more steps of the safety plan. Supports US-5.4.

post.description: Scans user input for crisis keywords and sentiment patterns. Returns risk level and recommended action. Supports REQ-CRS-010.
Uploads audio from a voice-modality session for transcription and emotional analysis. Supports US-2.4 and REQ-AIA-001.

201.description: Audio uploaded and queued for processing

get.summary: Get emotional analysis of an audio recording
get.description: Returns vocal tone, pace, pitch analysis, and detected emotional indicators. Supports REQ-AIA-002.

post.description: Uploads video from a video-modality session for facial expression analysis. Supports US-2.4 and REQ-AIA-003.

201.description: Video uploaded and queued for processing

get.summary: Get facial expression analysis of a video recording
get.description: Returns detected facial expressions and emotional states. Supports REQ-AIA-004.
Returns the authenticated user's profile including name, goals, preferences, severity level, and onboarding status.

patch.description: Updates the user's name, goals, preferred session time, or other profile fields. Supports REQ-PER-003/004/006.

post.description: Generates a complete export of the user's data in JSON format. Supports REQ-AUTH-007.

get.summary: Check data export status and download

delete.summary: Delete user account and all data
delete.description: Permanently deletes the user account and all associated data. Supports REQ-AUTH-007.

confirmPhrase.description: Must be 'DELETE MY ACCOUNT' to confirm

204.description: Account and all data permanently deleted

get.description: Returns the user's assigned therapist profile. Supports REQ-HCI-001/002.

post.summary: Generate a structured progress report for healthcare provider
post.description: Generates a clinical progress report with burnout trends, session stats, and distortion frequency. Supports REQ-HCI-003.

get.summary: Export assessment data in FHIR Observation format
get.description: Returns clinical assessment results in HL7 FHIR-compatible Observation resources. Supports REQ-HCI-006.
Returns a list of assigned patients with progress summaries and risk indicators. Supports REQ-HCI-005.
Returns audit log entries for data access events. Supports REQ-AUTH-006 and REQ-CRS-011.

mediaId.description: Reference to uploaded media if voice/video

crisisDetected.description: Whether crisis keywords were detected in the user message
